subcodes.first_line: O bewildered wanderer, the wise merely glean fragments and remain heedless of Layli's countenance, for such grace is bestowed on none but Majnun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته سودائی عاقلان خوشه چین از سر لیلی غافلند کین کرامت نیست جز مجنون
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
